scripts.web:dev: bun run contract:abis:copy && bun run --cwd ./packages/web dev
scripts.web:build: bun run contract:abis:copy && bun run --cwd ./packages/web build
scripts.contract:clean: bun run --cwd ./contracts sforge clean && bun run --cwd ./contracts rimraf broadcast/ cache/ out/
scripts.contract:deploy: source .env && VITE_CHAIN_ID=$VITE_CHAIN_ID bun contract:dev && DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY=$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY bun run --cwd ./contracts sforge script script/ClownBeatdown.s.sol --rpc-url $RPC_URL --broadcast && VITE_CHAIN_ID=$VITE_CHAIN_ID bun contract:addresses
scripts.contract:dev: bun contract:build && source .env && VITE_CHAIN_ID=$VITE_CHAIN_ID bun contract:abis
scripts.contract:abi: mkdir -p ./contracts/abis/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/contracts && jq --argjson chainId $VITE_CHAIN_ID '{chainId: $chainId, methodIdentifiers: .methodIdentifiers, abi: .abi}' ./contracts/out/$CONTRACT.sol/$CONTRACT.json > ./contracts/abis/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/contracts/$CONTRACT.json && bun prettier --write ./contracts/abis/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/contracts/$CONTRACT.json
scripts.contract:address: jq --arg receipt "$RECEIPT" -s '{"address": .[0].receipts[($receipt | tonumber)].contractAddress} * .[1]' ./contracts/broadcast/$BROADCAST.s.sol/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/run-latest.json ./contracts/abis/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/contracts/$CONTRACT.json > temp.json && mv temp.json ./contracts/abis/$VITE_CHAIN_ID/contracts/$CONTRACT.json
